title.en: In this way, Ye Tian's overall strength will sk...

content.en:
It is undoubtedly too difficult for the Five Elements Divine Wheel Great Divine Power to be promoted from the Xiaocheng realm to the Dacheng realm, and the gap between Xiaocheng's great divine power and Dacheng's great divine power is too big.

Ye Tian also hoped to be able to raise his Five Elements Divine Wheel to the Dacheng realm, but he only had 4 Origin Divine Pills, so he naturally wanted to make the most of these 4 Origin Divine Pills.

Moreover, the power of the Space Divine Power was much stronger than that of the Five Elements Divine Wheel, so Ye Tian really wanted to raise the Hellish Divine Sky Spear, a Spatial Divine Power, from the entry level to the Xiaocheng realm.

In this way, Ye Tian's overall strength will skyrocket.

Under the influence of the Origin Divine Pill, Ye Tian began to comprehend the laws of the Hell Divine Sky Spear, and the Hell Divine Sky Spear, which was difficult to understand in the past, was now as if he had seen the answer in the exam, and he suddenly understood it.

Time passed slowly, and an Origin Divine Pill ran out of energy.

Immediately, Ye Tian swallowed another Origin Divine Pill and continued to comprehend the Hellish Divine Sky Spear, a great spatial divine power.

He felt that he was not too far away from elevating the Hellish Divine Sky Spear, a great spatial divine power, to the Xiaocheng realm, so he continued to swallow the Origin Divine Pill.

Finally, Ye Tian exhausted the energy of this Origin Divine Pill again.

"Just a little bit less!"

Ye Tian was full of excitement, as long as he realized it again, he would be able to raise the great divine power of the Hell Divine Sky Spear to the realm of Xiaocheng.

Immediately, he took a look at the last Origin Divine Pill, gritted his teeth, and swallowed it in one gulp.

"The Spear of the Hell Divine Sky must be raised to the Xiaocheng realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

With the assistance of the last Origin Divine Pill, Ye Tian quickly completed his final comprehension, and finally comprehended the Hellish Divine Sky Spear, a spatial divine power, to the Xiaocheng realm.

The Hell Divine Sky Spear of the Xiaocheng Realm, how terrifying its power is, it is definitely far beyond the Five Elements Divine Wheel of the Xiaocheng Realm.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to the battle tower to test his strength, and easily killed the true god-level assessor who was comparable to the combat power of His Royal Highness of the Supreme Level.

According to Ye Tian's own calculations, his current combat power is not far from the son of the era, and when he compresses his immortal power and creates a supreme-level sword path mastery, then his combat power can definitely reach the son of the true god-level era!

"It's too difficult to maintain the combat power of the Children of the Era, it was good luck when I was at the god level, and I was lucky enough to raise the life level to the fourth order, but now that I have been promoted to the true god level, it is a little difficult to return to the combat power of the Children of the Era, but there is still a lot of hope. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If he raised his life level by one level at this time and reached the fifth order of life, it would be very easy to enter the combat power of the Children of the Era.

But it would be too difficult to raise the life level to the fifth order at the True God level.

The fifth-order life level is comparable to the supreme-level life level, and the supreme-level life level of this universe is also the fifth order, as for whether there is a sixth-order supreme, Ye Tian is not very clear.

But he knew very well that it was too difficult for the True God level to step into the sixth order of life, and it was even many times more difficult than raising the Hell Divine Sky Spear to the Dacheng realm.

Ye Tian didn't dare to think about it now, he just wanted to compress the immortal power a little now, and then look for some opportunities to see if he could make progress in the Dao Peer, even if he couldn't create the strongest level Sword Dao Peer, at least he had to have some understanding.

this day.

The Dark Lord came to tell Ye Tian one more thing, the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain wanted to trade the reincarnation quota in Ye Tian's hand, and it was all the quota.

"Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain!"

Ye Tian also knew a little about this force, but he didn't know too much.

The Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is one of the nine supreme-level forces, and it is an incomparably mysterious force.

There are not many members of this force, and it is definitely the one with the least number of members among the nine supreme-level forces, but it is also the most terrifying one, because he is the supreme-level force established by the Mixed Yuan Supreme.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme is the first supreme of the human race, and its strength is above the Kunwu Supreme, and it is rumored that the mixed yuan supreme has created a method of mixed yuan clones, with multiple clones, sitting all over the human race.

As for how many doppelgangers the Mixed Yuan Supreme has and where the main body is, no one knows.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme is known as the most powerful and mysterious Supreme of the Human Race, and just one person is worthy of many Supremes.

It is precisely because of the existence of the Mixed Yuan Supreme that the human race makes many cosmic races fearful.

Because the clones of the Mixed Yuan Supreme all have supreme-level strength, once a clone invades other universe clans, it will definitely bring huge losses to other universe clans.

And if the clone of the Mixed Yuan Supreme unfortunately falls, what will be lost is only a clone.

Therefore, the method of the Mixed Yuan Supreme Mixed Yuan Clone made all the races in the universe jealous, and they did not dare to easily tear their faces with the human race, otherwise the consequences would be unbearable for them.

There is a Mixed Yuan Supreme Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, you can imagine how powerful it is, and the high-end power can definitely be called the first of the nine supreme-level forces.

"Your Highness, the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is very mysterious, even I know very little, but the Mixed Yuan Supreme is the oldest supreme of the human race, it is rumored that the human race rose under the leadership of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and the treasures and opportunities possessed by the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain are definitely incomparable to other supreme-level forces. And the Supreme Hall of the Human Race actually doesn't have many opportunities, it's just some leftovers shared by the nine supreme-level forces, which is not worth mentioning. Your Highness, this time you can use the reincarnation quota this time to get some benefits from the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain. The Dark Lord reminded.

"I know!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Under the arrangement of the Dark Lord, Ye Tian met with an envoy from the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

Tianlan Big City, Tiange headquarters.

Ye Tian looked at a young girl in front of him and was quite surprised.

Although the age of the other party is not clear, Xiu Wei can see it clearly, and he is a great god.

The cultivation of the great god level is inevitably too low, even if he is a genius, it is too strange to negotiate as an envoy of a supreme-level force.

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't dare to underestimate this great god-level envoy, the breath coming from the other party was obviously a great god-level, at least an Eternal Ancient-level highness.

"Your Highness Wanfa, hello, I'm Li Xin'er from the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, you can call me Xin'er!"

Li Xin'er said with a smile.

"Li Xin'er?"

Ye Tian looked at Li Xin'er with some surprise, the other party didn't use the title.

In the universe, many people are accustomed to introducing themselves with titles, but it is very rare to use real names.

"Fairy Xin'er, it is said that the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain wants the reincarnation quota in my hand? Now I still have seven places in my hand, I don't know what price the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is willing to pay?"

Ye Tian asked.

Li Xin'er was silent for a while, and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, I also know you very well, ordinary treasures will definitely not be able to enter your eyes, and even ordinary chances will not be placed in your eyes." However, if you have a chance, you will definitely be very interested!"

"What chance?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"A small world in chaos, are you interested?"

Li Xin'er's words shocked Ye Tian.

"The small world in chaos, how can this be !!" Ye Tian exclaimed, "Aren't the creatures in our universe unable to leave the universe?"

Li Xin'er said with a smile: "It's not that you can't leave, the Supremes have a way to leave the universe, but they just need to pay some price, but even if they leave, they can't leave too far, because if they don't go beyond the universe, the natal true spirit still exists in the long river of time and space in the universe, once they are far away from the universe, the supreme level will become weaker and weaker until they die." The small chaotic world I just mentioned is indeed true. You should know very well that the universe is constantly expanding, and not long ago, the expansion of the universe swallowed up a small world, allowing this small world to enter our universe. At present, this small world has been discovered by our Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and a group of people have already entered it. As for the specific situation, I can't say it, it depends on whether you are willing to trade or not. "

"Okay, I'm willing to trade, but there must be one more condition, I want to borrow the Mixed Yuan True Classic of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain to read it!"

Ye Tian put forward his own conditions.
